sentences.target: Die Bevölkerung wächst hier jedes Jahr spürbar.
sentences.reading: /diː bəˈfœlkəʁʊŋ vɛkst hiːɐ̯ ˈjeːdəs jaːʁ ˈʃpyːɐ̯baːʁ/

translations.de: Die Bevölkerung wächst hier jedes Jahr spürbar.
translations.ipa: /diː bəˈfœlkəʁʊŋ vɛkst hiːɐ̯ ˈjeːdəs jaːʁ ˈʃpyːɐ̯baːʁ/
translations.en: The population grows noticeably here every year.
translations.es: Aquí la población aumenta cada año de forma notable.
translations.fr: Ici, la population augmente nettement chaque année.
translations.it: Qui la popolazione aumenta visibilmente ogni anno.
translations.ko: 여기 인구는 매년 눈에 띄게 늘고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这里的人口每年都在明显增长。
translations.yue: 呢度嘅人口每年都明顯增加。
translations.ru: Здесь население заметно растёт каждый год.
translations.pt: Aqui, a população cresce visivelmente todos os anos.
translations.he: כאן האוכלוסייה גדלה באופן מורגש מדי שנה.
translations.tr: Burada nüfus her yıl gözle görülür biçimde artıyor.
translations.vi: Dân số ở đây tăng rõ rệt mỗi năm.
translations.ar: يزداد عدد السكان هنا بشكل ملحوظ كل عام.
translations.nl: Hier groeit de bevolking elk jaar merkbaar.
translations.hu: Itt a népesség évről évre észrevehetően nő.
translations.hi: यहाँ जनसंख्या हर साल काफी बढ़ रही है.
translations.pl: Tutaj liczba ludności co roku zauważalnie rośnie.
translations.el: Εδώ ο πληθυσμός αυξάνεται αισθητά κάθε χρόνο.
translations.nb: Her øker befolkningen merkbart hvert år.
translations.id: Di sini jumlah penduduk meningkat secara nyata setiap tahun.
translations.sv: Här ökar befolkningen märkbart varje år.
translations.ro: Aici, populația crește vizibil în fiecare an.
translations.cs: Tady počet obyvatel každý rok znatelně roste.
translations.da: Her vokser befolkningen mærkbart hvert år.
translations.fi: Täällä väestö kasvaa huomattavasti joka vuosi.
translations.ja: ここでは毎年人口が目に見えて増えています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; agrees with feminine singular nominative noun 'Bevölkerung' as subject.
Common noun; feminine singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb; 3rd person singular present; intransitive; denotes increase.
Locative adverb; specifies place of growth.
Quantifying determiner; neuter accusative singular; modifies 'Jahr' in a temporal accusative phrase.
Common noun; neuter accusative singular; temporal complement ('every year').
Adverb of degree/manner; modifies 'wächst' indicating perceptibility.

sentences.target: Die Bevölkerung in Städten steigt derzeit stark.
sentences.reading: /diː bəˈfœlkəʁʊŋ ɪn ˈʃtɛtən ʃtaɪ̯kt ˈdeːɐ̯tsaɪ̯t ʃtaʁk/

translations.de: Die Bevölkerung in Städten steigt derzeit stark.
translations.ipa: /diː bəˈfœlkəʁʊŋ ɪn ˈʃtɛtən ʃtaɪ̯kt ˈdeːɐ̯tsaɪ̯t ʃtaʁk/
translations.en: The population in cities is currently rising sharply.
translations.es: Actualmente, la población en las ciudades está aumentando mucho.
translations.fr: La population dans les villes augmente fortement en ce moment.
translations.it: Attualmente la popolazione nelle città sta aumentando molto.
translations.ko: 현재 도시들의 인구가 크게 늘고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 目前城市人口增长很快。
translations.yue: 而家城市嘅人口增長得好快。
translations.ru: Сейчас население в городах резко растёт.
translations.pt: Atualmente, a população nas cidades está aumentando bastante.
translations.tr: Şehirlerde nüfus şu anda hızla artıyor.
translations.vi: Hiện tại dân số ở các thành phố đang tăng mạnh.
translations.ar: حالياً يرتفع عدد السكان في المدن بشكل كبير.
translations.nl: De bevolking in steden stijgt momenteel sterk.
translations.uk: Зараз населення в містах різко зростає.
translations.hu: Jelenleg a városokban a népesség gyorsan nő.
translations.hi: वर्तमान में शहरों में जनसंख्या तेज़ी से बढ़ रही है.
translations.pl: Obecnie liczba ludności w miastach szybko rośnie.
translations.el: Αυτή την περίοδο ο πληθυσμός στις πόλεις αυξάνεται έντονα.
translations.nb: Akkurat nå øker befolkningen i byene kraftig.
translations.id: Saat ini, jumlah penduduk di kota-kota meningkat tajam.
translations.sv: Just nu ökar befolkningen i städerna kraftigt.
translations.ro: În prezent, populația din orașe crește puternic.
translations.cs: V současnosti počet obyvatel ve městech prudce roste.
translations.da: Lige nu stiger befolkningen i byerne kraftigt.
translations.fi: Tällä hetkellä väestö kasvaa kaupungeissa nopeasti.
translations.ja: 現在、都市部の人口が急速に増えています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; marks feminine singular nominative noun 'Bevölkerung' as subject.
Common noun; feminine singular; head of the subject NP.
Preposition; governs dative; introduces the locative PP 'in Städten'.
Common noun; feminine dative plural; object of the preposition 'in'.
Finite main verb; 3rd person singular present; intransitive; denotes increase.
Temporal adverb; indicates present time frame.
Adverb of degree/manner; intensifies the increase expressed by 'steigt'.

translations.it: La nostra popolazione è molto varia.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的人口非常多样化。
translations.vi: Dân số của chúng tôi rất đa dạng.
translations.el: Ο πληθυσμός μας είναι πολύ ποικιλόμορφος.
translations.ja: 私たちの人口はとても多様です。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; agrees with feminine singular nominative 'Bevölkerung'; marks possession.
Common noun; feminine singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite auxiliary used as copula; 3rd person singular present; links subject to the predicate adjective.
Degree adverb; intensifies the predicate adjective 'vielfältig'.
Predicative adjective; subject complement describing 'Bevölkerung'.

sentences.target: Die Bevölkerung war gegen den Bau der Straße.
sentences.reading: /diː bəˈfœlkəʁʊŋ vaːʁ ˈɡeːɡən deːn baʊ̯ deːʁ ˈʃtʁaːsə/

translations.de: Die Bevölkerung war gegen den Bau der Straße.
translations.ipa: /diː bəˈfœlkəʁʊŋ vaːʁ ˈɡeːɡən deːn baʊ̯ deːʁ ˈʃtʁaːsə/
translations.en: The population was against the construction of the road.
translations.es: La población estaba en contra de la construcción de la carretera.
translations.fr: La population était contre la construction de la route.
translations.it: La popolazione era contraria alla costruzione della strada.
translations.zh-Hans: 民众反对修建这条道路。
translations.pt: A população era contra a construção da estrada.
translations.vi: Người dân phản đối việc xây dựng con đường.
translations.nl: De bevolking was tegen de aanleg van de weg.
translations.hu: A lakosság ellenezte az út megépítését.
translations.hi: लोग सड़क के निर्माण के खिलाफ थे.
translations.el: Ο πληθυσμός ήταν αντίθετος στην κατασκευή του δρόμου.
translations.nb: Befolkningen var imot byggingen av veien.
translations.ro: Populația a fost împotriva construirii drumului.
translations.da: Befolkningen var imod anlæggelsen af vejen.
translations.ja: 住民はその道路の建設に反対していました。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; marks feminine singular nominative noun 'Bevölkerung' as subject.
Common noun; feminine singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite auxiliary used as copula; 3rd person singular preterite; links subject to the predicate PP.
Preposition; governs accusative; introduces the PP expressing opposition.
Definite article; masculine accusative singular; determiner of 'Bau' within the PP.
Common noun; masculine accusative singular; head of NP complement of 'gegen'.
Definite article; feminine genitive singular; determiner of 'Straße' in a genitive dependent ('of the road') modifying 'Bau'.
Common noun; feminine genitive singular; complements 'Bau' specifying what is being constructed.
